location: Dropped by the Black Blade Kindred boss (a Valiant Gargoyle) guarding the entrance to the Bestial Sanctum, at the northernmost tip of Caelid's Dragonbarrow.
tactics: Head to the far north of Dragonbarrow, past Farum Greatbridge, to find the Bestial Sanctum; the Black Blade Kindred guards its entrance as an optional field boss.
It shares its drop pool with the visually similar Gargoyle's Black Halberd, so you may need multiple kills to get both weapons.
Its attacks channel the Rune of Death and can drain HP directly — don't confuse this fight with the separate Black Blade Kindred rematch found later in the Forbidden Lands near Crumbling Farum Azula.
It has relatively low poise for its size, making it vulnerable to heavy Strength weapons and jump attacks.
lore: A bronze greatsword carried by the Valiant Gargoyles, patched together with blackened corpse wax and marking its wielder as a servant of Maliketh, the Black Blade. Despite its grim, decayed look, it strikes with holy power.

builds.name: Strength/Faith Hybrid (Holy)
builds.why: D-rank scaling in both Strength and Faith with 122 base Holy attack power make it strong for Strength characters branching into Faith.

builds.name: Faith-Focused Holy Build
builds.why: The Corpse Wax Cutter skill's projectile component scales further with Faith, rewarding heavier Faith investment.
